title: Custom Hit Test
description: List of hitboxes for melee and ranged hits against the entity.

hitboxes.title: Hitboxes
hitboxes.description:
List of hitboxes for melee and ranged hits against the entity.

Properties:
• width (float)
• height (float)
• pivot

Sample values:
• hoglin: [{"width":1,"height":0.85,"pivot":[0,0.5,0]}]
• hoglin: [{"width":2,"height":1.75,"pivot":[0,1,0]}]
• zoglin: [{"height":1.75,"pivot":[0,1,0],"width":2}]
